text.title: AI IaC Hallucination Detector Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ai-iac-hallucination-detector. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent writes `aws_dynamodb_globaltable`; `init` succeeds (no schema check yet), `plan` fails 4 minutes in.
antipattern.fix: Run the detector in pre-commit + PR check before `plan`.

antipattern.symptom: Detector misses a new resource type because the cached schema is two versions old.
antipattern.root-cause: Schema cache TTL too long; provider version not pinned to lockfile.
antipattern.fix: Refresh schema on every provider lockfile change; pin TTL to 24h.

antipattern.symptom: Agent invents `hashicorp/awesome-network/aws`; `init` fails after burning CI runner.
antipattern.fix: Validate every module source against Registry index before init.
